title: ResearchOps application visual walkthrough
description: Generated evidence of the current application build, covering registered pages and important interaction states.

states.title: Default state
states.description: Initial loaded page state.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Home visual walkthrough

Scenario: Default state
  Given the route "/" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Default state" state
  And the state purpose is "Initial loaded page state."
  Then the page should load without a visual walkthrough failure
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

pages.title: Start research project
pages.description: Start page for creating or beginning research project work.

states.title: Default state
states.description: Initial loaded page state.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Default state
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Default state" state
  And the state purpose is "Initial loaded page state."
  Then the page should load without a visual walkthrough failure
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Step 1 completed with project definition
states.description: Project name, description, phase and status entered using believable discovery-stage dummy data.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Step 1 completed with project definition
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Step 1 completed with project definition" state
  And the state purpose is "Project name, description, phase and status entered using believable discovery-stage dummy data."
  When I enter "Assisted Digital Support Discovery" into "#p_name"
  When I enter "This discovery examines how caseworkers and support staff help people who cannot complete a digital application without assistance. The research will focus on …" into "#p_desc"
  When I select "discovery" from "#p_phase"
  When I select "planning" from "#p_status"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Step 2 default state
states.description: Second wizard step after a valid project definition has been entered on step 1.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Step 2 default state
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Step 2 default state" state
  And the state purpose is "Second wizard step after a valid project definition has been entered on step 1."
  When I enter "Assisted Digital Support Discovery" into "#p_name"
  When I enter "This discovery examines how caseworkers and support staff help people who cannot complete a digital application without assistance. The research will focus on …" into "#p_desc"
  When I select "discovery" from "#p_phase"
  When I select "planning" from "#p_status"
  When I choose the control "#next2"
  Then the selector "#step2" should be visible
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Step 2 completed without AI rewrite invoked
states.description: Stakeholders, objectives and user groups entered with realistic planning data before the AI rewrite is requested.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Step 2 completed without AI rewrite invoked
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Step 2 completed without AI rewrite invoked" state
  And the state purpose is "Stakeholders, objectives and user groups entered with realistic planning data before the AI rewrite is requested."
  When I enter "Assisted Digital Support Discovery" into "#p_name"
  When I enter "This discovery examines how caseworkers and support staff help people who cannot complete a digital application without assistance. The research will focus on …" into "#p_desc"
  When I select "discovery" from "#p_phase"
  When I select "planning" from "#p_status"
  When I choose the control "#next2"
  Then the selector "#step2" should be visible
  When I enter "Priya Shah | Service owner | priya.shah@example.gov.uk Mark Evans | Operations lead | mark.evans@example.gov.uk Amelia Brown | Policy adviser | amelia.brown@ex…" into "#p_stakeholders"
  When I enter "Understand where users need assisted digital support before, during and after the application journey. Identify operational signals that help staff recognise a…" into "#p_objectives"
  When I enter "Applicants with low digital confidence, support workers, caseworkers, users with accessibility needs, users who need language support" into "#p_usergroups"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Step 2 AI rewrite shown
states.description: Objectives meet the AI assistance threshold and the objectives AI rewrite panel is shown using a deterministic mocked response.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Step 2 AI rewrite shown
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Step 2 AI rewrite shown" state
  And the state purpose is "Objectives meet the AI assistance threshold and the objectives AI rewrite panel is shown using a deterministic mocked response."
  When I enter "Assisted Digital Support Discovery" into "#p_name"
  When I enter "This discovery examines how caseworkers and support staff help people who cannot complete a digital application without assistance. The research will focus on …" into "#p_desc"
  When I select "discovery" from "#p_phase"
  When I select "planning" from "#p_status"
  When I choose the control "#next2"
  Then the selector "#step2" should be visible
  When I enter "Priya Shah | Service owner | priya.shah@example.gov.uk Mark Evans | Operations lead | mark.evans@example.gov.uk Amelia Brown | Policy adviser | amelia.brown@ex…" into "#p_stakeholders"
  When I enter "Understand where users need assisted digital support before, during and after the application journey. Identify operational signals that help staff recognise a…" into "#p_objectives"
  When I enter "Applicants with low digital confidence, support workers, caseworkers, users with accessibility needs, users who need language support" into "#p_usergroups"
  Then the selector "#ai-objectives-tools:not(.hidden)" should be visible
  When I choose the control "#btn-obj-ai-rewrite"
  Then I should see "Concise rewrite (optional):"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Step 3 default state
states.description: Final wizard step after the project definition, stakeholders, objectives and user groups have been entered.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Step 3 default state
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Step 3 default state" state
  And the state purpose is "Final wizard step after the project definition, stakeholders, objectives and user groups have been entered."
  When I enter "Assisted Digital Support Discovery" into "#p_name"
  When I enter "This discovery examines how caseworkers and support staff help people who cannot complete a digital application without assistance. The research will focus on …" into "#p_desc"
  When I select "discovery" from "#p_phase"
  When I select "planning" from "#p_status"
  When I choose the control "#next2"
  Then the selector "#step2" should be visible
  When I enter "Priya Shah | Service owner | priya.shah@example.gov.uk Mark Evans | Operations lead | mark.evans@example.gov.uk Amelia Brown | Policy adviser | amelia.brown@ex…" into "#p_stakeholders"
  When I enter "Understand where users need assisted digital support before, during and after the application journey. Identify operational signals that help staff recognise a…" into "#p_objectives"
  When I enter "Applicants with low digital confidence, support workers, caseworkers, users with accessibility needs, users who need language support" into "#p_usergroups"
  When I choose the control "#next3"
  Then the selector "#step3" should be visible
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Step 3 completed before create project
states.description: Lead researcher, email and project notes entered on the final wizard step before project creation is submitted.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Start research project visual walkthrough

Scenario: Step 3 completed before create project
  Given the route "/pages/start/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Step 3 completed before create project" state
  And the state purpose is "Lead researcher, email and project notes entered on the final wizard step before project creation is submitted."
  When I enter "Assisted Digital Support Discovery" into "#p_name"
  When I enter "This discovery examines how caseworkers and support staff help people who cannot complete a digital application without assistance. The research will focus on …" into "#p_desc"
  When I select "discovery" from "#p_phase"
  When I select "planning" from "#p_status"
  When I choose the control "#next2"
  Then the selector "#step2" should be visible
  When I enter "Priya Shah | Service owner | priya.shah@example.gov.uk Mark Evans | Operations lead | mark.evans@example.gov.uk Amelia Brown | Policy adviser | amelia.brown@ex…" into "#p_stakeholders"
  When I enter "Understand where users need assisted digital support before, during and after the application journey. Identify operational signals that help staff recognise a…" into "#p_objectives"
  When I enter "Applicants with low digital confidence, support workers, caseworkers, users with accessibility needs, users who need language support" into "#p_usergroups"
  When I choose the control "#next3"
  Then the selector "#step3" should be visible
  When I enter "Alex Morgan" into "#lead_name"
  When I enter "alex.morgan@example.gov.uk" into "#lead_email"
  When I enter "Initial recruitment should include users with different levels of digital confidence and staff who handle assisted digital requests." into "#p_notes"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

pages.title: Participant consent
pages.description: Study-scoped participant consent recording and review page.

states.title: Consent workspace loaded
states.description: Participant consent loaded with study context, a published consent form, participants and existing consent records.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Participant consent visual walkthrough

Scenario: Consent workspace loaded
  Given the route "/pages/study/participant-consent/?pid=recVisualConsentProject001&sid=recVisualConsentStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Consent workspace loaded" state
  And the state purpose is "Participant consent loaded with study context, a published consent form, participants and existing consent records."
  Then I should see "Participant consent loaded."
  Then I should see "Assisted digital interview consent form"
  Then I should see "Ready for session"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Missing study context error state
states.description: Participant consent loaded without project and study IDs; the page shows a blocking route-context message.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Participant consent visual walkthrough

Scenario: Missing study context error state
  Given the route "/pages/study/participant-consent/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Missing study context error state" state
  And the state purpose is "Participant consent loaded without project and study IDs; the page shows a blocking route-context message."
  Then I should see "Open this page from a study"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: No published consent form state
states.description: The study has route context and participants, but no published consent form exists. The page routes the researcher to create consent forms before recording participant consent.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Participant consent visual walkthrough

Scenario: No published consent form state
  Given the route "/pages/study/participant-consent/?pid=recVisualConsentProject001&sid=recVisualConsentStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "No published consent form state" state
  And the state purpose is "The study has route context and participants, but no published consent form exists. The page routes the researcher to create consent forms before recording participant consent."
  Then I should see "Create and publish a consent form before recording participant consent"
  Then I should see "Create consent forms"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: No participants state
states.description: The study has a published consent form, but no participants are available. The page routes the researcher to schedule participants before recording consent.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Participant consent visual walkthrough

Scenario: No participants state
  Given the route "/pages/study/participant-consent/?pid=recVisualConsentProject001&sid=recVisualConsentStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "No participants state" state
  And the state purpose is "The study has a published consent form, but no participants are available. The page routes the researcher to schedule participants before recording consent."
  Then I should see "Add participants before recording consent"
  Then I should see "Schedule participants"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Participant selected for consent review
states.description: A researcher selects a participant with an existing consent record and can review required statements, optional permissions and withdrawal controls.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Participant consent visual walkthrough

Scenario: Participant selected for consent review
  Given the route "/pages/study/participant-consent/?pid=recVisualConsentProject001&sid=recVisualConsentStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Participant selected for consent review" state
  And the state purpose is "A researcher selects a participant with an existing consent record and can review required statements, optional permissions and withdrawal controls."
  Then I should see "Participant consent loaded."
  When I choose the control "[data-record-consent=\"participant-sofia-patel\"]"
  Then I should see "Review consent for Sofia Patel"
  Then I should see "Record withdrawal or do not proceed"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

pages.title: Study synthesis
pages.description: Study-scoped evidence grouping and theme creation page.

states.title: Missing study ID error state
states.description: Synthesis loaded without a study ID; the page shows the blocking route-context error.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Missing study ID error state
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/index.html" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Missing study ID error state" state
  And the state purpose is "Synthesis loaded without a study ID; the page shows the blocking route-context error."
  Then the page should load without a visual walkthrough failure
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Empty evidence state
states.description: Study synthesis loaded with valid study context but no captured evidence notes. The page routes the researcher to evidence capture rather than showing synthesis controls.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Empty evidence state
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/?pid=recVisualProject001&sid=recVisualStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Empty evidence state" state
  And the state purpose is "Study synthesis loaded with valid study context but no captured evidence notes. The page routes the researcher to evidence capture rather than showing synthesis controls."
  Then I should see "Capture evidence before starting synthesis"
  Then I should see "Capture evidence in a session"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Evidence available before working clusters
states.description: Study synthesis with realistic evidence available. The first available task is creating a working cluster grouping; evidence selection remains hidden until a cluster exists.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Evidence available before working clusters
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/?pid=recVisualProject001&sid=recVisualStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Evidence available before working clusters" state
  And the state purpose is "Study synthesis with realistic evidence available. The first available task is creating a working cluster grouping; evidence selection remains hidden until a cluster exists."
  Then I should see "Create a working cluster grouping before selecting evidence."
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Working cluster grouping created
states.description: A researcher creates a provisional working cluster grouping before adding evidence. Evidence selection becomes available only after the cluster exists.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Working cluster grouping created
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/?pid=recVisualProject001&sid=recVisualStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Working cluster grouping created" state
  And the state purpose is "A researcher creates a provisional working cluster grouping before adding evidence. Evidence selection becomes available only after the cluster exists."
  When I enter "Confidence before the form starts" into "#cluster-label"
  When I enter "Evidence about how users judge whether they are ready to begin the service." into "#cluster-description"
  When I choose the control "#create-cluster"
  Then I should see "Created working cluster grouping Confidence before the form starts."
  Then I should see "I was not sure whether I had the right documents before I started, so I nearly called the helpline instead of continuing online."
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Evidence added to working cluster grouping
states.description: A researcher selects two evidence notes and adds them to an existing working cluster grouping. Theme creation becomes available after evidence is grouped.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Evidence added to working cluster grouping
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/?pid=recVisualProject001&sid=recVisualStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Evidence added to working cluster grouping" state
  And the state purpose is "A researcher selects two evidence notes and adds them to an existing working cluster grouping. Theme creation becomes available after evidence is grouped."
  When I check "#evidence-ev-confidence-before-start"
  When I check "#evidence-ev-language-support"
  When I select "cluster-confidence-start" from "#target-cluster"
  When I choose the control "#add-selected-evidence"
  Then I should see "Added 2 evidence items to Confidence before the form starts."
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Theme creation hidden before evidence is grouped
states.description: Theme creation remains hidden until at least one working cluster grouping contains source evidence.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Theme creation hidden before evidence is grouped
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/?pid=recVisualProject001&sid=recVisualStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Theme creation hidden before evidence is grouped" state
  And the state purpose is "Theme creation remains hidden until at least one working cluster grouping contains source evidence."
  Then the selector "[data-cluster-id=\"cluster-confidence-start\"]" should be visible
  Then I should see "Add evidence to a working cluster grouping before creating a theme."
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"

states.title: Theme created with evidence traceability
states.description: A theme is created from a populated cluster and the source evidence IDs remain inspectable.
states.acceptanceCriteria:
Feature: Study synthesis visual walkthrough

Scenario: Theme created with evidence traceability
  Given the route "/pages/synthesize/?pid=recVisualProject001&sid=recVisualStudy001" is available
  And I am reviewing the "Theme created with evidence traceability" state
  And the state purpose is "A theme is created from a populated cluster and the source evidence IDs remain inspectable."
  When I select "cluster-confidence-start" from "#theme-cluster"
  When I enter "Digital confidence is shaped before the form starts" into "#theme-label"
  When I enter "Users decide whether to continue based on evidence expectations, support routes and confidence before they begin entering details." into "#theme-description"
  When I choose the control "#create-theme"
  Then I should see "Created theme Digital confidence is shaped before the form starts."
  When I choose the control ".theme-card .govuk-details__summary"
  And the captured evidence status should be "captured"
